overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a character in a yellow jacket and hat exploring a futuristic neon-lit city at dusk. The clip begins with a static overlook of the city skyline from a rooftop balcony, transitions to walking through an outdoor pedestrian plaza with palm trees and vendors, and ends in a covered corridor with artificial lighting.

events.description: character stands up from the balcony edge after observing the city

agents.ego_description: character sits on the balcony edge looking out at the neon-lit city skyline, then stands up

entered.detail: metal and concrete safety railing along the balcony edge with vertical bars
glowing corporate billboards and holographic advertisements on distant towers
curved elevated roadway structure with red neon lighting accents
tall glass and steel towers with illuminated windows and antennas
large rectangular planters with tropical greenery along the balcony perimeter

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rooftop balcony at dusk, with the camera positioned behind a character sitting on a concrete ledge. The character overlooks a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape filled with neon signs, elevated highways, and futuristic skyscrapers. The balcony has metal railings and potted plants, providing a semi-sheltered viewpoint. After observing the view, the character stands up at the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with palm trees and food vendors

events.description: character leaves the balcony overlook and enters the open pedestrian plaza
character descends the concrete stairway to the lower plaza level

agents.ego_description: character walks along the elevated walkway, descends stairs, and traverses the pedestrian plaza passing by a food vendor

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the railing looking out at the city view
vendor standing behind the illuminated food stall

entered.detail: tropical palm trees in large blue planters scattered across the plaza
street food cart with orange umbrella and warm yellow lighting
wide concrete stairs with metal railings connecting upper and lower plaza levels

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking through an open-air pedestrian plaza decorated with palm trees and neon accents. The camera follows as the character descends a stairway to a lower level, passing by a food vendor stall with an orange umbrella. Other pedestrians are scattered throughout the area, and the elevated highway remains visible in the background to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with commercial storefronts

events.description: character enters the covered pedestrian corridor from the open plaza
lighting shifts from natural dusk to dim artificial corridor lighting with neon accents

agents.ego_description: character walks through the dimly lit covered corridor, passing other pedestrians and illuminated storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction through the corridor
pedestrian leaning against the corridor wall near the windows

entered.detail: concrete overhang and ceiling structure covering the pedestrian path
large illuminated grid windows of shops and offices with warm interior lighting
illuminated vertical advertisement sign with text IT'S BIG in white letters

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered pedestrian corridor, transitioning from the open plaza to an enclosed walkway. The environment becomes darker with artificial lighting from neon signs and commercial windows. The character continues walking forward through the corridor, passing other pedestrians and illuminated storefronts, with occasional views of the city visible through openings on the left side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a static, contemplative overlook of a futuristic skyline before shifting into a more active perspective. It begins behind a character sitting on a concrete ledge of a rooftop balcony, framed by metal railings and potted plants. As the camera lingers, the sprawling cyberpunk cityscape unfolds in the background, filled with glowing neon signs, elevated highways, and towering skyscrapers under a dusk sky. The scene then shifts in energy as the character stands up from the ledge, transitioning the viewpoint from a still observation of the urban expanse to a state of readiness.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open-air pedestrian plaza into a dimly lit, enclosed urban corridor. It begins with the character walking through a plaza decorated with palm trees and neon accents, descending a stairway past a food vendor with an orange umbrella while an elevated highway looms in the background. As the character moves forward, the open environment shifts into a covered pedestrian walkway, causing the natural dusk light to give way to the glow of artificial neon signs and commercial windows. The scene then narrows into this enclosed corridor, passing illuminated storefronts and other pedestrians before finally gliding deeper into the artificial lighting of the city's interior.
